items.title: Solana’s $8.7B RWA surge shows tokenized assets are finally starting to move
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $8.7 billion increase in tokenized assets on Solana indicates growing institutional interest, which could enhance liquidity and ecosystem stability.

items.title: Solana Meme Coin Bonk Treasury Drained of $20 Million in 'Malicious' Governance Attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The draining of $20 million from the Bonk Treasury highlights vulnerabilities in governance structures, potentially impacting investor confidence and overall ecosystem security.

items.title: ANSEM soars 299% and brings Solana’s memecoin trenches back to life – but do we need it now?
items.whyYouShouldCare: ANSEM's 299% surge revitalizes Solana's memecoin sector, but raises questions about the sustainability and necessity of such tokens in the current market.
